title: Exotic Korean Brussels Sprouts Bibimbap
description: A romantic and herbal Korean dish featuring Brussels sprouts and pickle, perfect for a special occasion, and friendly to dairy-free diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toss the Brussels sprouts with sesame oil, Korean chili flakes, and salt on a baking sheet.
Roast the Brussels sprouts in the oven for 20 minutes, or until tender and caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar and 1 tablespoon of water.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked white rice, roasted Brussels sprouts, diced pickle, and cubed tofu.
Drizzle the rice vinegar mixture over the top of the rice mixture and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds over the top of the bibimbap.
Serve the bibimbap hot, with additional Korean chili flakes and pickle on the side if desired.
